name: salesforce-skills
displayName: Expert Skills for Salesforce Certification Domains (unofficial)
description: Unofficial — not affiliated with, authorized by, or endorsed by Salesforce. 13 operational skills covering Salesforce practitioner domains (Administrator, Advanced Administrator, Platform Developer I/II, JavaScript Developer I, Technical Architect, the Consultants, Business Analyst, Agentforce Specialist). Each gives an agent the rules, limits, decision criteria, and anti-patterns a credentialed practitioner applies. Guidance, not ground truth — verify against live orgs and official docs.
